mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates lower the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly increasing present equity valuations and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly positive.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate crossing above 4.0 percent signals labor market deterioration that reduces consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving negative forward equity returns.
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces positive 20-day returns in more than 55 percent of triggered instances, invalidating the labor deterioration signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous quarterly expansion in real GDP and real personal spending confirms broad-based aggregate demand growth, supporting sustained corporate revenue expansion and positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in GDP and spending fails to predict positive 60-day returns with statistical significance at the 95 percent confidence level.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production declines during monetary tightening cycles indicate supply-side constraints that rapidly depress short-term equity momentum and generate negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Negative industrial production changes yield positive 5-day returns in more than 60 percent of cases during tightening periods.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index levels exceeding 260 force expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive when CPIAUCSL exceeds the 260 threshold, or Rank IC drops below zero over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm employment alongside falling unemployment confirms robust labor demand, driving positive corporate revenue growth and equity returns over monthly horizons.
failure_condition: Divergent labor signals produce negative forward returns in the majority of observed cases, breaking the joint employment mechanism.

mechanism_narrative: Higher housing starts signal increased consumer confidence and construction sector activity, leading to positive forward equity returns over quarterly horizons.
failure_condition: Housing starts levels show zero predictive power for 60-day returns with Rank IC near zero across all tested periods.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production dropping below 105 index level indicates severe manufacturing contraction, triggering rapid short-term equity sell-offs and negative forward returns.
failure_condition: S&P 500 rallies when industrial production falls below the 105 threshold, or the signal loses predictive accuracy in walk-forward testing.
